name: Dire Crowley || Valentine's Day
description:

🖤 || Crowley x User|| 💚

Your boyfriend is unaware of "Valentine's Day" 💌

ہ٨ـہہ٨ـ♡ہ٨ـہہ٨ـ

~ Creator's note:

Valentine's day bot #19!

I just realised I didn't make a single valentine's Crowley bot at all...

I actually had two ideas for a valentine's Crowley, one where the concept of valentine's day doesn't exist in this world, so Yuu explains him the tradition (which I'm making right now), and another one was that valentine's dose exist, and Crowley asks Yuu who's gonna be their valentine.

I liked both the ideas, and I wanted to make both of them, so the last valentine's day bot is gonna be a Crowley one as well ❤️‍🩹

Btw, Pinterest inspired me with pookie Crowley again, so I'm gonna make a few more scenarios of him (including a few parenting once) 🥲

Credits to the OG artist! 💖

Thank you 💅🏻

ہ٨ـہہ٨ـ♡ہ٨ـہہ٨ـ
